subject: net: tipc: bcast: Replace GFP_ATOMIC with GFP_KERNEL in tipc_bcast_init()
notes: Reused features.json, plan.json, poc.c, poc-db, poc-verifier-verdict.csv from prior aborted d3-prep attempt (Jun 30 13:46-13:47).
Verifier-v1 already OK from prior attempt (no regeneration needed).

Stage 4 predicate isAtomicAllocCall needed 1 refinement: initial body matched GFP_ATOMIC by argument toString(), but POC's GFP_ATOMIC #define is expanded by gcc to integer 32 before CodeQL extraction; broadened to also match flag.getValue()="32" and any MacroInvocation named GFP_ATOMIC.
Other 3 predicates compiled and ran OK on first iteration with no refinements.
POC contains only _buggy + _fixed variants (no _tp/_tn/_fp lookalikes) because the seed slice is small; oracle: silence on _fixed verified, silence on _fp_ trivially satisfied.
Stage 5 final.ql compiled and accepted on first attempt; one row firing on tipc_bcast_init_buggy at the GFP_ATOMIC kzalloc call site.
